用例标题: 验证原子指标时间维度选择非日期型，查询粒度选择月、季、年查询结果

前置条件：
1）建表语句
CREATE TABLE AOMS.dwd_order_fact (
    order_id VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '订单ID',
    user_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户标识',
    order_time DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '下单时间',
    order_date DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '订单日期(分区字段)',
    order_year INT NOT NULL COMMENT '订单年份',
    order_month VARCHAR(6) NOT NULL COMMENT '订单年月(YYYYMM)',
    order_day VARCHAR(8) COMMENT '订单日期(YYYYMMDD格式)',
    order_intday INT COMMENT '订单日期(YYYYMMDD数值型格式)',
    order_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL COMMENT '订单实付金额',
    is_first_order BOOLEAN COMMENT '是否首单',
    channel VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '订单来源渠道',
    create_time DATETIME COMMENT '创建时间'
) ENGINE=OLAP 
DUPLICATE KEY(order_id)
PARTITION BY RANGE(order_date) (
    PARTITION p202405 VALUES LESS THAN (“2024-06-01“),
    PARTITION p202406 VALUES LESS THAN (“2024-07-01“),
    PARTITION p202509 VALUES LESS THAN (“2025-10-01“), 
    PARTITION p202510 VALUES LESS THAN (“2025-11-01“),
    PARTITION p202511 VALUES LESS THAN (“2025-12-01“)
)
DISTRIBUTED BY HASH(order_id) BUCKETS 8 
PROPERTIES (
    “replication_num“ = “1“,
    “storage_format“ = “DEFAULT“
);
